## [00:00 - 01:17]

As a keynote speaker, I've always wondered why do keynote speakers get paid so much money? The crazy thing about this event is I'm actually showing this stage with Gary Vaynerchuk. There is zero people you know that have built a successful business without working their face off. The biggest illusion you ever experience is when you tell yourself something cannot be done. That guy's pretty amazing. Gary Vee has been a huge inspiration for me growing up. You see speakers like Gary Vaynerchuk get paid tens of thousands of dollars to be on stage, including myself. And the question you must really then ask is why do speakers get paid so much money? And I'm not sharing this with you because I'm trying to get you to get into the speaking world or the speaking profession. I'm sharing with you this because you've got to think why do these speakers get paid so much? And it's again, it's because of one reason. And the reason is being able to speak with clarity, being able to speak in a way that inspires people, being able to speak in a way that is influential, it's the most highly valued skill set in the world. As you begin your journey with me mastering this human instrument, understand one thing, you were born to be amazing. You were born to perform and it's time for you to take your stage.
